limitations: The current marketplace dataset does not contain enough independent variation for all Q components. In particular, Mercari preprocessing does not provide real item age, so vintage_score is not a reliable calibration signal.
interpretation: The file does not automatically replace expert weights in math_core.py. When calibration_status is limited_not_applied, the grid-search result is treated as a diagnostic rather than a production replacement, because the current dataset cannot justify changing all expert weights.
